messages.message: Watch the traffic!
so this is why i got late to work today
flease go do this so it would be funny
insurance company left the gam
THAT SEDAN NEVER STOOD A CHANCE
i still owe 4 years on that car bro
filing the claim already, this is gonna be fun
well that solves the traffic jam i guess
great, more inventory for me to sell apparently
my car was literally parked right there
finally someone dealing with road rage properly
every alarm in a 5 block radius is going off now
good thing i failed my driving test, dodged a bullet
MY MINIVAN HAD THE KIDS SNACKS IN IT
RIP to that sports car, gone too soon
calling every tow truck in the city right now
bumper to bumper traffic just got resolved instantly
still making payments on a car that no longer exists
as a valet, this is my worst nightmare
honestly better than hitting a pothole i guess
the windshield wipers are still going on the wreck lol
well it doesnt need a car wash anymore
thats a leased vehicle, the dealership is gonna be mad
roadwork crew just got a lot less work to do
good thing it wasnt in my driveway this time
the horn is stuck and just blaring nonstop now
thats heading straight to the junkyard now
thats more than a fender bender, thats a fender ender
roadside assistance is NOT covering this one
good thing it wasnt full of gas, yikes
PLEASE tell me there were no car seats in there
traffic control just gave up for the day
one less vehicle to register this year
scrap metal prices about to go up thanks to this
the dealership warranty definitely doesnt cover snake damage
highway patrol is gonna need a new report category
please tell me that wasnt a rental car
the backseat driver couldnt even complain anymore
well it definitely doesnt need an oil change now
the bobblehead on the dash did NOT survive that
guess that parking ticket is irrelevant now
the auto body shop is gonna need a bigger lot
didnt even need a speed bump for that one
well that car definitely isnt carpooling anymore
the tires just exploded on impact, wild
still in debt for a car that no longer has a shape
that was packed for a road trip too, unlucky
even the airbags gave up trying to help
thought SUVs were supposed to be tough, guess not
the truck bed is basically pancake now
the license plate flew like 50 feet, impressive
that cars carfax report just got way more interesting
as a mechanic, theres nothing left for me to fix here
well it wont be needing that recall fix now
they were literally in the drive thru line too
well that reduces someones carbon footprint instantly
whatever was in the trunk is definitely gone now
hubcaps flying everywhere, free souvenirs
the loan collector is gonna have a tough call to make
the traffic camera definitely caught all of that
construction crew didnt even need to detour anyone now
glass shattering everywhere, watch your step
the car horn is just stuck blaring into the void now
well it definitely fails inspection now
the bumper sticker survived better than the bumper
putting flowers down for that poor sedan
traffic report just got a LOT more interesting today
every alarm on the block triggered at once, chaos
the dealership is gonna deny this warranty claim instantly
engine block just got launched into the next lane
the windshield is in like 50 pieces now
road debris everywhere, drive carefully out there
thats not a fender bender, thats a full car crush
another vehicle added to the victim list today
the auto insurance industry is shaking right now
good thing it was on the road and not someones driveway
guess im car shopping again, thanks a lot
the brake pads never even got a chance to engage
the traffic light is judging this whole scene silently
no amount of dent repair is fixing that one
the car keys are somewhere in that wreckage probably
good thing nobody was actually inside that car
the muffler just rolled off down the street
another casualty for the used car lot statistics
thats gonna leave some serious road rash on the pavement
the anti theft alarm really thought it could help
wreckage scattered across the whole intersection now
that fresh paint job lasted all of two minutes
traffic flow somehow improved after that, ironically
auto loan approval rates about to drop after this stream
the road sign got taken out as collateral damage too
scrapyard owners are loving this stream honestly
witnessing this live is wild, calling my insurance agent
tire pressure is the least of that cars problems now
the horn echo is honestly kind of eerie now
roadwork crews are taking notes for next time
resale value just hit a flat zero, literally
adding this wreck to my collection, just kidding, or am i
the traffic ticker just crashed trying to update
auto parts stores about to get a rush of orders
